analysis —
law IFRS 15 / ASC 606 owns the canonical types for the five-step revenue model (identify contract → obligations → transaction price → allocate → recognize) plus its balance-sheet artefacts (ContractAsset/Liability, RefundLiability) — the one shape every revenue collection and posting service projects onto, so the obligation enums cannot drift.
